title: Risk Margin Position
description: Margin position details for risk calculation, including instrument identification, position quantities and monetary values

financialInstrumentIdentification.description: Identification of the financial instrument associated with the margin position

tickerSymbol.description: Letters that identify stocks traded on stock exchange

expirationDate.description: Expiry date of the instrument for the margin position

netPosition.description: Value of the net position for the margin position (Long Position - Short Position)

netValue.description: Net monetary value of the margin position

broughtForwardNetValue.description: Brought forward net of the margin position

imSubPortfolio.description: IM sub portfolio of the instrument for the margin position

longPosition.description: Amount of long position for the margin position

shortPosition.description: Amount of short position for the margin position

longValue.description: Monetary value of the long position

shortValue.description: Monetary value of the short position
